headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Biogen, Birkenstock, Fastly, Ford, Lennox International, Netskope, SanDisk, Tesla, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: The futures are trading mixed this morning, after what started as another week of the same old song and dance yesterday, before stocks turned around before noon, and it was an off-and-running, risk-off Monday, with all the major market indices posting strong gains and finishing the day higher.
